comment: Standalone config for the Playwright specs (Playwright transpiles them with its own loader; this drives type-checking / the IDE). module/moduleResolution 'nodenext' is the modern, non-deprecated Node setting (the old 'node'/'node10' stops functioning in TS 7). Because package.json has no "type":"module", these .ts files resolve as CommonJS — exactly what the specs depend on: fixtures.ts uses __dirname and extension-less relative imports for Playwright's CJS loader.
